_comment: Pinned mistral.rs build manifest. Populated by .github/workflows/release.yml on each tagged release. The capture path refuses to launch a mistral.rs binary whose SHA-256 is not listed under binaries[] for the host's target triple. Audit finding S-7: a soft pin (--version string equality) is not sufficient because a malicious mistral.rs binary on $PATH could report any version string. Hash-pinning closes that gap.
placeholder_reason: upstream_commit has not been pinned to a real audited mistral.rs commit yet. Until release.yml replaces this with a verified commit and populates binaries[] with built-binary hashes, start.sh refuses to launch in strict mode (WITNESS_MISTRALRS_LOCAL_DEV=1 bypasses for local development).
